title: Brendan O'Hara MP, Contact & Press Enquiry Details
meta_description: How to get in touch with Brendan O'Hara MP
headings: h2: Get in touch with our friendly team:
text_excerpt: Brendan O'Hara MP, Contact & Press Enquiry Details Skip to content Menu Home News About Contact Newsletter Brendan O’Hara MP Contact Brendan Newsletter Get in touch with our friendly team: Brendan has members of staff based in his constituency office who will be happy to assist constituents with any concerns you may have. You can get in touch with us directly using the brendan.ohara.mp@parliament.uk email address, by filling out the contact form below, or by calling us on 01436 670587 . Please note that I can only deal with cases from constituents who live in the Argyll and Bute UK Parliamentary constituency. Leave this field blank First name Second name Email Address Postcode Phone Comment or Message GDPR & Privacy Agreement I consent to having this website store my submitted information so that they can respond to my inquiry. If that's OK, just click 'Accept all', otherwise click 'Settings' to modify. Things like Video & Surveys will not work without 'Experience' cookies being accepted. We use a fully privacy-first analytics solution that is fully GDPR compliant, EU-based, and does not set any tracking cookies whatsoever - plausible.io. Read our cookie policy Settings Accept all Cookies Choose what kind of cookies to accept. Your choice will be saved for one year. Read our cookie policy Necessary These cookies are not optional. They are needed for the website to function. Statistics In order for us to improve the website's functionality and structure, based on how the website is used. Experience In order for our website to perform as well as possible during your visit. If you refuse these cookies, some functionality, such as videos and surveys, will not work.
